positive: A stylized, abstract depiction of a peaceful celestial landscape viewed from a futuristic balcony. The central focus is a massive, bioluminescent nebula swirling in shades of deep indigo, electric cyan, and vibrant magenta. Smaller, crescent-shaped moons and stylized planetary rings orbit the nebula. The foreground features highly detailed, geometric crystalline flora and smooth, monolithic pillars casting dramatic, stylized shadows. The overall style should be high-contrast, neo-art deco with clean, graphic lines, mimicking engraved stone and glow. The lighting is dramatic and directional, emphasizing strong silhouettes and clean edges suitable for screen printing. Perfect central composition, vector art aesthetic, 4k print quality, maximum sharpness.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, artifact, low resolution, amateur, sketch, drawing, text, logo, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, muted colors, soft focus, bokeh
